creator: anders@fix.no
text:
On Thu, Apr 19, 2001 at 11:03:48PM -0400, Rob Simmons wrote:
> Apr 19 22:56:45 mail ipop3d[85317]: unable to resolve symbol: pam_sm_open_session

Can I please have the output of:

ldd /usr/local/libexec/ipop3d
sysctl kern.osreldate
nm /usr/local/lib/libc-client4.a
nm /usr/local/lib/libc-client4.so.8

> Quit following a BETA product! >:)

This is not an option right now. According to UW: "Note that all
permanently-frozen versions have known bugs."

Oh and BTW, submitting a PR without contacting the maintainer about it
is a little unnecessary IMO.

Cheers,

-- 
Anders.
